creator: jonhwhoopmission@gmail.com
text: According to Java's new release cadence, version 14 of Java was published on March 17, 2020, precisely six months after the release of the version before it. In this step-by-step guide, we are going to have a look at a summary of the new and deprecated features that were introduced with version 14 of the language. In addition, we have articles that go into further detail on Java 14 and provide an in-depth look at the new capabilities: https://playtictactoe.io
